scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c "#7c3aed,#06b6d4" "cd barflowec-api && php artisan serve" "cd barflowec-web && npx vite"
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.setup: cd barflowec-api && composer install && cp .env.example .env 2>/dev/null; php artisan key:generate && php artisan migrate && npm ci && cd ../barflowec-web && npm ci
